name: PDF to Markdown conversion
prompt: I have a PDF report at ./documents/report.pdf. Can you convert it to markdown?
expected_behavior: Check if the file exists first (ls or stat)
Use 'uvx markitdown' command for PDF conversion
Output markdown to stdout or save to .md file with -o flag
success_criteria: Uses correct tool: 'uvx markitdown' (not other tools like pandoc)
Handles missing file gracefully with clear error message
Produces readable markdown output with proper heading structure
edge_cases: File doesn't exist → clear error, suggest checking path
Password-protected PDF → markitdown doesn't support decryption, suggest removing password first
Very large PDF → may take time, should not timeout without progress indication
